translated: The mother is everywhere, holding the maternal path so that they may do the work now their task is fulfilled. Since that day, the Galileo man has come now for the people. Therefore, the mother's way is known. The great mother's thoughts, our minds can gather the mother's people.

text: Mɔ belemgbin Elɔdɩ nwunlin kɛ ngɛlɛfʋɛ'n-mɔ a laka yɩ́'n, ɔ fɛlɩ ɛya kpa. Ɔ tɩtɩlɩ cɩan'n mɔ ngɛlɛfʋɛ'n-mɔ nwunlin nzalama'n dede a, anɩn ɔ'a nwun kɛ batʋnman'n ka kaan di afʋɛ nnyuan. translated: There was a child named Eldad who carried a staff, and he set out on a journey. He gathered his things and took the staff to go to the distant land of Nnyuan. ref: Now hurry! Tell his disciples he has been raised to life and is on his way to Galilee. Go there, and you will see him. This is what I came to tell you.”
text: Ɛmɔ hɔ́ ndɛ-ndɛ bɛ hán héle yɩ́ menian'n-mɔ kɛ ɔ fi ewue nun ɔ'a tinnge. Sian dɩɛ, ɔ lɛ kɔ a nwʋnndɛ ɛmɔ Galile mân nɩn anun. Ɛlɔ yɛ̂ ɛmɔ 'nwun yɩ́ ɔ. Ngalɩɛ'n mɔ mɩ́n nwan mɩn 'kan mɩn kele ɛmɔ nɩn anɩn.”
translated: He truly holds great power within himself, for he continues to work tirelessly day and night. Since he has come to know the truth of Galileo's teachings, his deeds have become evident. Thereby, his strength remains, and the truth we see with our own eyes confirms his works.

ref: When Herod found out that the wise men from the east had tricked him, he was very angry. He gave orders for his men to kill all the boys who lived in or near Bethlehem and were two years old and younger. This was based on what he had learned from the wise men.
text: Mɔ belemgbin Elɔdɩ nwunlin kɛ ngɛlɛfʋɛ'n-mɔ a laka yɩ́'n, ɔ fɛlɩ ɛya kpa. Ɔ tɩtɩlɩ cɩan'n mɔ ngɛlɛfʋɛ'n-mɔ nwunlin nzalama'n dede a, anɩn ɔ'a nwun kɛ batʋnman'n ka kaan di afʋɛ nnyuan. Yɩ́ ti, ɔ kɔ sʋan yɩ́ nzalafʋ'n-mɔ Betelehɛmʋn nʋn kulo'n-mɔ kʋalaa mɔ bɛ mantan mantan yɩ́'n-mɔ asʋ kɛ bɛ hɔ́ hún mmatʋnman mmelenzua mɔ b'a li afʋɛ nnyuan'n, ɔ nʋn bɛ́ mɔ bɛ lili man afʋɛ nnyuan'n kʋalaatin.
translated: He brought the offering Elɔdɩ along with him to the child and placed it there. He then took the offering to the end of the journey, proceeding along the path to reach the destination. However, he journeyed to the place called Bethlehem along the road, step by step, seeking the correct path to reach the destination, and he finally arrived at the end of the journey.

translated: There is a place called Apoo where the people gather to listen to the elders' truths, and it is through these gatherings that the community preserves its customs and traditions through storytelling.
